CustomField.formula: IF( Due_Diligence_Expiration_Remainder_Days__c = 1, 'DD/Option Current Expiration - '+ TEXT(Due_Diligence_Expiration_Remainder_Days__c) + ' Day Left', 'DD/Option Current Expiration - '+ TEXT(Due_Diligence_Expiration_Remainder_Days__c) + ' Days Left' )
CustomField.label: Due Diligence Expiration Email Subject
